text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I haven't forgotten how it felt losing my last
race...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But I've worked to overcome my weaknesses since
then.
choice_data_list: And you've got the perfect strategy!
And you've got the perfect strategy!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I've memorized everything from the course
and track conditions to the characteristics of my
opponents.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: First place will be mine today.
